prompt: How should I tweak a program that mostly works before deciding to switch programs entirely?
assertions: Advises not changing things while progress is still happening
When plateau appears, determine whether more stress or less stress is needed
Recommends small targeted changes (volume, intensity, frequency, or exercise selection) rather than overhauling everything
Suggests evaluating each change for a few weeks before making another
States that switching to a completely new program is reasonable only after serial tweaks fail
